nasb.text: Tomorrow go down against them. Behold, they will come up by the ascent of Ziz, and you will find them at the end of the valley in front of the wilderness of Jeruel.

esv.text: Tomorrow go down against them. Behold, they will come up by the ascent of Ziz. You will find them at the end of the valley, east of the wilderness of Jeruel.

cnv.text: 明天你們要下去攻擊他們，他們會從洗斯的斜坡上來，你們必在耶魯伊勒曠野東面的谷口遇見他們。

ccb.text: 明天你们下去迎敌，敌军会从洗斯坡上来，你们一定会在耶鲁伊勒旷野前面的谷口遇见他们。
